title: Discharge Time Trend
description: Run chart with y-axis in clock format.

inputs.name: discharge_month
inputs.description: Date at which the discharge time measure has been evaluated. The granularity of this field can be changed from month to quarter, week etc.

inputs.name: avg_discharge_hour
inputs.description: Measure that calculates average discharge time as a decimal hour, for example 13.9 for 13:54.
